title: Hungrier
description: Always eat food, even when the hunger bar is full!
body:
# Hungrier
**Never let a delicious meal go to waste! A simple yet practical addition ensures that you can indulge in your favorite food, even when your hunger bar is full. No more running around before your lovely dinner!**

# ✅ Features
- **Always eat** food, even when the hunger bar is full
- **Fully cosmetic**, no extra mechanics added. Perfect for RPG!
